meta.title: Pediatric new patient with Healthy Kids Dental
meta.description: Guardian scheduling first visit for child — HKD program classification required.

turns.speaker: aly
turns.text: Cascade Family Dentistry, this is Aly. How can I help you today?

turns.speaker: patient
turns.text: Hi, this is Lisa Park. My son Ethan has never been to a dentist and I'd like to get him in for a check-up.

turns.speaker: aly
turns.text: We'd be happy to help. Can I get Ethan's date of birth and your phone number?

turns.speaker: patient
turns.text: Ethan was born March 14, 2018. My number is 616-555-0103.

turns.speaker: patient
turns.text: He has Healthy Kids Dental through the state.
